prompt: When the `json escape` setting is enabled, calling `res.json(undefined)` causes a crash because `JSON.stringify(undefined)` returns `undefined`, which the router tries to call `.replace()` on. Fix the handling of undefined when `json escape` is enabled in `lib/response.js`.
expectedBehavior: res.json(undefined) should not crash when json escape is enabled, it should correctly handle the undefined return from JSON.stringify.
